parameters-en.Dwell: Controls the intensity or regeneration of the reverb. WARNING: At higher values, Particle Verb can get a little bit out of control, which isn't necessarily a bad thing.
parameters-en.Condition: Selects the mode of Particle Verb. Stable mode turns your chords into a lush modulated pad. Critical mode is similar, but with a slight rise in pitch. In Hazard mode, all stops are removed.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the reverb and the dry signal. At 0%, no reverb is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
